3089680.name: Fishing Mayhem
3089680.description:
Fish ahoy! Fishing Mayhem is a game in development, coming to Steam in Early Access in 2024.

Fishing Mayhem is a top-down multiplayer battler with a simple goal: get the most fish!

As a seasoned angler with a seaworthy vessel, this may seem like an easy task, but watch out for other fisherfolk out to claim the Golden Gill!

Unleash an arsenal of weapons and powerups and develop your play style and outsmart, outshoot, and outfish your foes!
3089680.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
